## Title: Replace magic number with symbolic constant for PDU type field size

### Summary
The nFAPI packing functions in `nfapi_p7.c` used the magic number `1` in five locations to represent the size of the PDU type field when calculating PDU sizes. This pattern, repeated with identical comments ("add 1 for the pdu_type"), made the code's intent unclear and maintenance error-prone. This change introduces a symbolic constant `NFAPI_PDU_TYPE_FIELD_SIZE` to explicitly document this field size, imp
